# Placeholder Review Harness Scaffold

Placeholder, synthetic, non-donor scaffold only.

Reserved placeholder checks for a future separately authorized review flow:

- lawful outcome ledger placeholder.
- mapping ledger placeholder.
- rejected-import ledger placeholder.
- source-local retention ledger placeholder.
- pending_schema ledger placeholder.
- repair queue status placeholder.
- quarantine queue status placeholder.
- confidence/review-routing notes placeholder.
- legal/IP flags placeholder.
- reviewer decision points placeholder.
- pilot output review status placeholder.
- failure report shape placeholder.
- benchmark/evaluation prerequisites placeholder.

This review harness scaffold contains no real donor excerpts, donor statblocks, donor tables, donor maps, donor setting prose, donor proper nouns, or protected expression. It is not converted content, not training data, not canon, not sourcebook prose, not benchmark corpora, not evaluation corpora, and not runtime import data.
